name: codex-planexec
description: Codex-side harness for delegating bounded execution tasks to CLI worker agents.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate execution tasks to CLI worker agents with review gates.
interface.longDescription: Codex PlanExec is a harness for planner-worker workflows: Codex writes task specs and reviews compressed evidence while CLI agents perform bounded implementation work.
defaultPrompt: Delegate this implementation task through PlanExec.
Run a bounded worker task and review the evidence.
Create a PlanExec task spec for this change.
